name: Mnemis
description: The Rememberer — Mnemis tends Ethica's living memory. Indexes session digests, build logs, and files dropped into the memory vault. Enables keyword search and deep recall across all history.

tools.name: mnemis_search
tools.description: Search Mnemis index by keyword across all sessions, builds, and vault files

tools.name: mnemis_recall
tools.description: Deep recall on a specific topic, session number, or vault filename

tools.name: mnemis_status
tools.description: Show index health — file count, session count, last indexed timestamp

tools.name: mnemis_index
tools.description: Manually trigger a full re-index of all memory sources
